raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX 2025, I contacted Citibank to report the unauthorized charges. During my call, I explained that I had not used the card in over a year and could not have incurred the charges in question. I was assured by your Fraud Department that an investigation would be opened and that I would receive a written notice detailing the results.

Despite following up with Citibank twice, I have not received any correspondence or outcome from your fraud investigation team. During these follow-up calls, I also made it clear to your representatives that I would not agree to pay the disputed charges until a proper investigation had been completed and I was informed of the findings.

To add to my concern, I have now received a letter from Citibank implying that my XXXX Citibank account, which I have held in good standing for many years, may be cancelled if I do not pay the disputed amount related to the Double Cash card. This feels not only retaliatory but deeply unfair given the circumstances and lack of communication by Citibank.
